title: One-step equations with negatives (add & subtract)
description: Solve one-step addition and subtraction equations that include negative numbers.

hints:
Simplifying, we get:

$w = 11$

Simplifying, we get:

 $y = -51$

To isolate $p$, we add $9$ to both sides.  

$\begin{align}
-11&=p-9 \\\\
-11\blueD{+9}&=p-9\blueD{+9} \\\\
-11\blueD{+9}&=p
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

 $p = -2$

To isolate $z$, we add $-12$ to both sides.  

$\begin{align}
14&=z-\left(-12\right) \\\\
14\blueD{+\left(-12\right)}&=z-\left(-12\right)\blueD{+\left(-12\right)} \\\\
14\blueD{+\left(-12\right)}&=z
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

 $z = 2$

Simplifying, we get:

$a = 2.36$

Simplifying, we get:

$h = -10.071$

To isolate $q$, we add $4.8$ to both sides.  

$\begin{align}
-9&=q-4.8 \\\\
-9\blueD{+4.8}&=q-4.8\blueD{+4.8} \\\\
-9\blueD{+4.8}&=q
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$q = -4.2$

To isolate $u$, we add $-11$ to both sides.  

$\begin{align}
-10.74&=u-\left(-11\right) \\\\
-10.74\blueD{+\left(-11\right)}&=u-\left(-11\right)\blueD{+\left(-11\right)} \\\\
-10.74\blueD{+\left(-11\right)}&=u
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$u = -21.74$

Simplifying, we get:

$b = \dfrac{13}{12}$

Simplifying, we get:

$k = -1$

To isolate $r$, we add $-\dfrac{8}{5}$ to both sides.  

$\begin{align}
\dfrac{7}{10}&=r-\left(-\dfrac{8}{5}\right) \\\\
\dfrac{7}{10}\blueD{+\left(-\dfrac{8}{5}\right)}&=r-\left(-\dfrac{8}{5}\right)\blueD{+\left(-\dfrac{8}{5}\right)} \\\\
\dfrac{7}{10}\blueD{+\left(-\dfrac{8}{5}\right)}&=r
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$r = -\dfrac{9}{10}$

To isolate $v$, we add $\dfrac{1}{2}$ to both sides.  

$\begin{align}
-\dfrac{9}{8}&=v-\dfrac{1}{2} \\\\
-\dfrac{9}{8}\blueD{+\dfrac{1}{2}}&=v-\dfrac{1}{2}\blueD{+\dfrac{1}{2}} \\\\
-\dfrac{9}{8}\blueD{+\dfrac{1}{2}}&=v
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$v = -\dfrac{5}{8}$

To isolate $n$, we subtract $22$ from both sides.  
*Remember: Subtracting is the same as adding the opposite.*

$\begin{align}
22+n&=-12 \\\\
22+n\blueD{-22}&=-12\blueD{-22} \\\\
n&=-12\blueD{-22} \\\\
n&=-12\blueD{+\left(-22\right)}
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$n = -34$

To isolate $s$, we subtract $-13$ from both sides.  
*Remember: Subtracting is the same as adding the opposite.*

$\begin{align}
-7&=s+\left(-13\right) \\\\
-7\blueD{-\left(-13\right)}&=s+\left(-13\right)\blueD{-\left(-13\right)} \\\\
-7\blueD{-\left(-13\right)}&=s \\\\
-7\blueD{+13}&=s
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$s = 6$

To isolate $k$, we subtract $-14$ from both sides.  
*Remember: Subtracting is the same as adding the opposite.*

$\begin{align}
17&=\left(-14\right)+k \\\\
17\blueD{-\left(-14\right)}&=\left(-14\right)+k\blueD{-\left(-14\right)} \\\\
17\blueD{-\left(-14\right)}&=k \\\\
17\blueD{+14}&=k
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$k = 31$

To isolate $c$, we subtract $8$ from both sides.  
*Remember: Subtracting is the same as adding the opposite.*

$\begin{align}
c+8&=-11 \\\\
c+8\blueD{-8}&=-11\blueD{-8} \\\\
c&=-11\blueD{-8} \\\\
c&=-11\blueD{+\left(-8\right)}
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$c = -19$

To isolate $d$, we subtract $-5.004$ from both sides.  
*Remember: Subtracting is the same as adding the opposite.*

$\begin{align}
d+\left(-5.004\right)&=2.826 \\\\
d+\left(-5.004\right)\blueD{-\left(-5.004\right)}&=2.826\blueD{-\left(-5.004\right)} \\\\
d&=2.826\blueD{-\left(-5.004\right)} \\\\
d&=2.826\blueD{+5.004}
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$d = 7.83$

To isolate $\ell$, we subtract $-7.4$ from both sides.  
*Remember: Subtracting is the same as adding the opposite.*

$\begin{align}
\left(-7.4\right)+\ell&=9.11 \\\\
\left(-7.4\right)+\ell\blueD{-\left(-7.4\right)}&=9.11\blueD{-\left(-7.4\right)} \\\\
\ell&=9.11\blueD{-\left(-7.4\right)} \\\\
\ell&=9.11\blueD{+7.4}
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$\ell = 16.51$

To isolate $s$, we subtract $-0.8$ from both sides.  
*Remember: Subtracting is the same as adding the opposite.*

$\begin{align}
-0.2&=s+\left(-0.8\right) \\\\
-0.2\blueD{-\left(-0.8\right)}&=s+\left(-0.8\right)\blueD{-\left(-0.8\right)} \\\\
-0.2\blueD{-\left(-0.8\right)}&=s \\\\
-0.2\blueD{+0.8}&=s
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$s = 0.6$

To isolate $x$, we subtract $3.99$ from both sides.  
*Remember: Subtracting is the same as adding the opposite.*

$\begin{align}
-18.43&=3.99+x \\\\
-18.43\blueD{-3.99}&=3.99+x\blueD{-3.99} \\\\
-18.43\blueD{-3.99}&=x \\\\
-18.43\blueD{+\left(-3.99\right)}&=x
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$x = -22.42$

To isolate $f$, we subtract $\dfrac{1}{4}$ from both sides.  
*Remember: Subtracting is the same as adding the opposite.*

$\begin{align}
f+\dfrac{1}{4}&=-\dfrac{7}{2} \\\\
f+\dfrac{1}{4}\blueD{-\dfrac{1}{4}}&=-\dfrac{7}{2}\blueD{-\dfrac{1}{4}} \\\\
f&=-\dfrac{7}{2}\blueD{-\dfrac{1}{4}} \\\\
f&=-\dfrac{7}{2}\blueD{+\left(-\dfrac{1}{4}\right)}
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$f = -\dfrac{15}{4}$

To isolate $m$, we subtract $-\dfrac{11}{6}$ from both sides.  
*Remember: Subtracting is the same as adding the opposite.*

$\begin{align}
\left(-\dfrac{11}{6}\right)+m&=-\dfrac{2}{9} \\\\
\left(-\dfrac{11}{6}\right)+m\blueD{-\left(-\dfrac{11}{6}\right)}&=-\dfrac{2}{9}\blueD{-\left(-\dfrac{11}{6}\right)} \\\\
m&=-\dfrac{2}{9}\blueD{-\left(-\dfrac{11}{6}\right)} \\\\
m&=-\dfrac{2}{9}\blueD{+\dfrac{11}{6}}
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$m = \dfrac{29}{18}$

To isolate $t$, we subtract $-\dfrac{13}{20}$ from both sides.  
*Remember: Subtracting is the same as adding the opposite.*

$\begin{align}
\dfrac{17}{20}&=t+\left(-\dfrac{13}{20}\right) \\\\
\dfrac{17}{20}\blueD{-\left(-\dfrac{13}{20}\right)}&=t+\left(-\dfrac{13}{20}\right)\blueD{-\left(-\dfrac{13}{20}\right)} \\\\
\dfrac{17}{20}\blueD{-\left(-\dfrac{13}{20}\right)}&=t \\\\
\dfrac{17}{20}\blueD{+\dfrac{13}{20}}&=t
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$t = \dfrac{3}{2}$

To isolate $g$, we subtract $-\dfrac{5}{4}$ from both sides.  
*Remember: Subtracting is the same as adding the opposite.*

$\begin{align}
\dfrac{3}{16}&=\left(-\dfrac{5}{4}\right)+g \\\\
\dfrac{3}{16}\blueD{-\left(-\dfrac{5}{4}\right)}&=\left(-\dfrac{5}{4}\right)+g\blueD{-\left(-\dfrac{5}{4}\right)} \\\\
\dfrac{3}{16}\blueD{-\left(-\dfrac{5}{4}\right)}&=g \\\\
\dfrac{3}{16}\blueD{+\dfrac{5}{4}}&=g
\end{align}$

Simplifying, we get:

$g = \dfrac{23}{16}$
